title: Version Metadata Repair Hotfix
manual_review: v0.43.1 is withdrawn/superseded and should not be used as a stable version.
If your forgekit_version still shows 0.43.0 after this migration, your state.json was not on the v0.43.0 baseline; review the diff manually.
The repair only affects version metadata; it does not change any functionality from v0.43.0/v0.43.1, including Project Capsule Bootstrap, review-needed, manual-merge, and CLI language.
non_goals: No new features beyond version metadata alignment
